race.description: Laurels Function Centre Book Now Maiden Plate
race.comment: POMAH (12) might be the only danger. She ran an encouraging race first up here on wet ground, going forward and just being overhauled late by a nose. She has the benefit of a run under the belt and will take some beating. BOOMEROO (8) ran well fresh at Geelong when boxing on for third. She can get into a good spot here and figure again. SALTILLO (7) was fair on debut at Geelong but can only improve while HIMALAYAN (9) could sneak into the first four.
